_meta.name: env
_meta.purpose: Claude classifies as env — environment-level failure (auth dropped, service down, wrong target). Test code is fine; the environment isn't.
_meta.matches_on: prompt contains '401 Unauthorized' (from error_message in DiagnoseInput)

output.human_explanation: Test session lost authentication — the API gateway returned 401 on the /accounts request after a successful login earlier in the same scenario. Likely a token-expiry or cookie-rotation issue in the test environment, not a test or app code problem.
evidence: Login step (Given) passed earlier in the same scenario — session WAS established
Target env: test-uk. Recent test-uk SSO token TTL was reduced from 30m to 5m per a recent platform change

alternatives_considered.rejected_because: Login step itself passed in this run — the session was created, then expired mid-run
401 is immediate, not a timeout — the server actively rejected the request
